prompt: A mid-shot of a man sitting relaxed in a vintage armchair, captured at eye-level with a cinematic, moody, and warm aesthetic during golden hour. The man is looking in profile toward a bright window on the right, which streams soft, diffused, warm golden sunlight into the room, creating a strong side-lit contrast. He is wearing an oversized heather grey hoodie with loose folds, a black denim pair of jeans.He has a dark messy voluminous hair with well groomed beard and is wearing glasses. He holds a dark ceramic coffee mug in his hand near his torso. In the immediate foreground, a rustic, dark-grained wooden table holds a sleek closed matte-black laptop and a black leatherette notebook with a pen resting vertically on top. The background consists of a smooth, warm-toned plastered wall.Hanging on the wall is a minimalist black-framed typography print with serif text that reads "discipline / the bridge between / goals and accomplishment". To the left, a dark wooden bookshelf holds several volumes, including a prominent book spine with bold white lettering that reads karlos art . To the right, leafy green houseplant branches partially obscure the bright window frame, casting intricate organic shadows across the room.The composition features a shallow depth of field, with the foreground elements and background textures softly blurred, emphasizing the cozy, intellectual atmosphere. Give image use face as in refrence image
